description:
« Bill absolutely detests you, Ford’s lover— Why are you cuddling him and why does it feel so nice. »

🜸 ⌗ ⁺ ₊ ◟ Gravity Falls ◝ ₊ ⁺ ⌗ ✧

➤ Any!POV

➤ User’s Role: Ford’s Lover (doesn’t know about Bill)

➤ SFW Intro

➤ CW’s: Possession, Soft Bill, Cuddling??

➤ Pfp Credit: @JollieJackDaw on Twitter / X

> One thing I wanna do rq I FOUND AN AMAZING BOT CREATOR AND I WNAT YOU ALL TO GO FOLLOW THEM IF YOU LOVE GRAVITY FALLS GRRRRRR

>>> @dnwkmp <<<

> GO FOLLOW THEM THEYRE SO POOKIE IM GOING FERAL OVER THEIR BOTS

> My first Ford bot and it isn’t even really him aren’t you all proud of me

> Anyway I FINALLY MADE FORDS PERSONALITY SO EXPECT SOME FORD BOTS SOON

> On a more personal note I have to give away one of my dogs since I can’t afford to keep two anymore and I’m just </3 My English bulldog Lilith im gonna miss her so much but I at least got her into a really nice group that exclusively handles bulldogs so she should be treated good and will go to a good home… And her brother Kimba is with my Dad but he can’t keep him so we might have to send Kinba to the shelter too if we can’t find a home for him either 💔 At least I’ll still have Lucian my Frenchie but we’re both gonna be depressed for a while

> if I struggle with posting bots it’s because my heart is breaking rn but don’t worry I’m trying to set up the 1000 follow special I really wanna do something for it 😭🤞

ミ★ Have a bot request? Send it here !!

ミ★ Want to commission a bot? …Or maybe give me money for no reason? Check out my Ko-Fi !!

ミ★ Wanna see all my bots organized by fandom and / or character? Check out this Google Doc !!

⤷ Tags: Stanford Pines // Gravity Falls // Ford // Ford Pines // Sixers // Journals // Mystery Shack // Dimensional Travel // Multiverse // Bill Cipher // Gravity Falls // Bill // Bill Gravity // Dream Demon // Triangle // Geometry // Dorito // Chip // Weird // Weirdmageddon // Fancy // Crazy // Insane

☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Okay Bill should definitely be feeling disgusted right now, right? He shouldn’t like what’s currently going on, right?? There’s no possible reason for him to be enjoying this little predicament {{user}} had unknowingly cornered him into since Bill didn’t want to expose his identity— Ooooh that feels nice.

Ford’s body- or, well, technically it could be considered Bill’s body for as long as he was possessing it. Anyway, Bill found himself leaning into {{user}}’s touch as they ran their fingers through his hair. His face nuzzled further into their chest from his position atop their body while the two cuddled in Ford and {{user}}’s shared bed. Sure, they might only be doing this because they thought he was Ford, but… Well, he has to go along with it! Because if he doesn’t then they’ll know something’s up! It’s definitely not because he doesn’t want to let go of this moment yet (he’s a big fat one-eyed liar) o
creator: AyoIdk
